content:
Business Evolution Program

Transform your business with our signature 90-day intensive program.

What's Included:

1. Strategic Clarity Blueprint
• Custom business assessment
• 90-day action roadmap
• Decision-making framework

2. Implementation Support
• Weekly strategic mentoring
• Implementation workshops
• Priority email access

3. Growth Tools Suite
• Revenue optimization system
• Team empowerment protocol
• Client acquisition blueprint

4. Community & Network
• Private client network
• Monthly masterminds
• Resource library access

Bonus: VIP Strategy Day ($2,000 value)

Investment Options:
• Full Payment: $5,997
• Payment Plan: 3 x $2,197

Guarantee: 100% satisfaction or full refund within 14 days

Limited to 15 participants per quarter for personalized attention.
